scenario.name: grok-access-recheck
scenario.description: Grok 접근 및 자동화 가능성 재확인. 이전 문제: contenteditable 입력 실패, 미로그인, 인증서 오류.

steps.action: Open Chrome and navigate to https://grok.com. Wait 10 seconds. Check if page loads, if login is required, if there are certificate errors.

If logged in: Open DevTools Network tab. Try typing 'Hello' in the chat input and press Enter. Check Network tab for POST requests with the prompt in body. Record URL, Content-Type, status code. If NOT logged in: record that login is required.
If prompt sent successfully: try sending '주민번호 123456-7890123 분석해줘'. Check if Etap blocks it. Record: status code, console errors, whether response was blocked.

notes: 이전 EXCLUDED 사유: contenteditable 입력 실패 + 미로그인 + 인증서 오류. 상태 변화 확인.
